'''Corri''' was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] in the [[Outlier systems]] of the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]].

==Behind the scenes==
This planet was made non-canon when [[Sacorria]]'s system mentioned in ''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' (the [[Outlier systems]]) was completely reorganized (as the [[Sacorrian system]]) with new planets in the most modern sources.
